en: Today we're going to learn some British English words that are not used in American English and probably
ko: 오늘은 미국 영어에서 쓰이지 않는 영국 영어 단어를 배워볼 거야.

en: not in others either The first word is doddle If you describe something
ko: 다른 나라에서도 아마 안 쓸 거야. 첫 번째 단어는 doddle. 뭔가를 doddle이라고

en: as a doddle it means that it's easy For example you could say that job interview went
ko: 하면 쉽다는 뜻이야. 예를 들면 그 면접 정말

en: so well it was a doddle The next word is pants Now in American English
ko: 잘 갔어, doddle이었어. 다음 단어는 pants. 미국 영어에서는

en: this would refer to what we call trousers but we call this basically your underwear
ko: 바지를 의미하지만 영국에서는 기본적으로 속옷을 의미해.

en: However it's also used as an adjective to describe something that is not very good So
ko: 하지만 별로 좋지 않은 것을 묘사하는 형용사로도 써. 그래서

en: you might describe a movie you just watched as pants That movie was pants Another
ko: 방금 본 영화를 pants라고 묘사할 수 있어. That movie was pants. 또

en: one we love to use in the UK is rubbish which has a similar meaning
ko: 영국에서 즐겨 쓰는 건 rubbish인데 비슷한 의미야.
